I: I create beautiful, functional, and user-centered digital experiences. With 1 years of experiences in web Development, I bring ideas to life through clean code and thoughtful design
title: My Journey
p1: My name is Tohir, born in 2007. My journey in software development started early, driven by a deep curiosity for how modern web applications are built and scaled.
p2: I began with frontend development, building a solid foundation through hands-on practice and continuous learning at IT Park and later refining my skills at Najot Ta'lim.
p3: Over time, my perspective evolved from simply writing code to understanding systems as a whole — focusing on scalability, maintainability, and clean architecture.
p4: When working with existing projects, I prioritize deep analysis of the codebase, identifying structure, patterns, and potential improvements for long-term stability.
p5: For new projects, I take full ownership from architecture planning to implementation — ensuring clean structure, reusable components, and minimal technical debt.
p6: I actively leverage Claude AI to design, architect, and build production-grade systems — including a full enterprise REST API with JWT, Redis, PostgreSQL, Docker, and complete test coverage. AI doesn't write the code for me; I direct it through precise file structure, architectural thinking, and structured prompts.
exp_text: I have over a year of practical experience as a frontend developer, contributing to real-world projects with a focus on performance, scalability, and maintainable code.
PROJECTS_SUBTITLE: Selected examples of frontend work, interfaces, and collaborative products.
PROJECT_ITPARK_DESC: Working with IT Park to grow my frontend skills and collaborate on real projects while building useful digital products with modern technologies.
PROJECT_GIPERMART_DESC: Built a modern online marketplace using React 19 and Vite. Implemented scalable architecture with Redux Toolkit, TanStack Query, and a product search experience.
PROJECT_TTG_DESC: Developed a role-based learning platform for a Japanese company with Admin, Teacher, and Student interfaces.
PROJECT_SUN_ENERGY_DESC: Improved performance and user experience with reusable frontend architecture and close collaboration between frontend and backend teams.
PROJECT_BIZCORE_DESC: Frontend development for a scalable marketplace where business owners sell and manage products online.
RADIATORPRO_DESC: A promotional website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to showcase a heating service master. The site presents the master’s services, profile, contact details, and working locations clearly.
PROJECT_IMRAGIT_DESC: Designed a modern and user-friendly interface for a corporate website with a clear layout and strong visuals.
PROJECT_BACKEND_DESC: Production-grade REST API built collaboratively with Claude AI through structured architectural prompts and file-system design. Implements enterprise security: JWT + Argon2 password hashing, SHA-256 refresh token rotation, Redis session management, Helmet headers, CORS allowlist, and rate limiting. Full Zod DTO validation, Pino structured logging, Swagger/OpenAPI docs, and Docker Compose DevOps. All tests passing ✓
PROJECT_REACTNATIVE_DESC: Cross-platform mobile application built with React Native. Delivers smooth native-like UX on both iOS and Android with reusable component architecture, navigation, and API integration.
